chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 766 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.1 2. For orders on CMA No.3667/2019 3. For hearing of main case 28.10.2025 Qazi Ali Kamal, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2019 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. Learned counsel was confronted with the observation that the question of law framed for determination appear to either argumentative in nature and / or seek to agitate factual controversy. In response he remained unable to assist and merely seeks time. This reference application has clogged the docket for more than six years and we see no reason to perpetuate the matter in view of the dearth of assistance provided. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
